item.description:

item.description:
Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 1h Arne Slot. #LFC
On Hugo Ekitike…
‘Not too good. I think we could all see that it didn't look well and didn't look good. Let's wait and see what it will be. But we could all see it didn't look good…’
‘In the second half he went home so I haven't seen him yet. Losing a Mostrar más 1 6 4 mil
